title: Paper-24: KnightForge / N-Dimensional Chess Automata
abstract: KnightForge, board automata, L-conjugate closure, finite greedy placement, VOA sector split, frame operator

D_claims.claim: If L == R : already at rest.
If L == C : swap C and R  (transposition (23)) -> (L, R, C).
If C == R : swap L and C  (transposition (12)) -> (C, L, R).
